g.text: Gimbal Apparatus (24V) | ESP32 + 4x TMC2209 + 4x NEMA 17 | Yaw, Pitch, Roll, Belt
Linear Rail System | HGR15 1000mm + Belt Drive
GEO-DUDe Servicer (12V) | Pi + PCA9685 + Pi Camera | 2 arms (10 servos) + MACE reaction wheel | 10 limit switches
Base Station | Raspberry Pi + Laptop (Operator UI)
